fields.acceptance_criteria: GPU canvas is position:fixed covering the full viewport (behind all UI); smoke/particles visible behind sidebar/header/tab-bar via glass transparency; canvas resolution matches devicePixelRatio for sharp rendering on HiDPI displays
fields.title: Bug: GPU canvas should cover the full page, not just hypergraph view

fields.acceptance_criteria: GPU canvas is position:fixed covering full viewport at z-index:-1 (opaque, behind all UI); smoke/particles visible on ALL tabs (not just hypergraph); global toggle to disable GPU shading; canvas resolution scales by devicePixelRatio for sharp HiDPI rendering; resize listener syncs canvas on window/viewport changes; HypergraphView registers 3D callback on shared overlay rather than owning the canvas
fields.interview_answers: Q1: GPU overlay always running on every tab, with global toggles to disable GPU shading. Q2: Proper HiDPI support (devicePixelRatio scaling), going beyond the original TS frontend. Q3: Opaque canvas at z-index:-1 (matching original approach).
